## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

What problem does this solve?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] New recipe / example
- [ ] New Kiro version verification
- [ ] Installer improvement
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Verification
- [ ] Ran `tests/Test-Script.ps1` locally — passes
- [ ] If docs: spell-checked and lint-checked
- [ ] If installer: verified on Windows / macOS / Linux as applicable
- [ ] If recipe: tested by applying it and confirming Kiro behavior

## Checklist
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Updated relevant `docs/*.md`
- [ ] Linked any related issues
